/usr/bin/c++ -g "CMakeFiles/tysm-game.dir/main/main.cpp.o" -o tysm-game  /usr/lib64/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib64/libSDL2.so runtime/libtysm-runtime.a /usr/lib64/libspdlog.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib64/libSDL2.so /usr/lib64/libSDL2main.a /usr/lib64/libspdlog.so.1.11.0 /usr/lib64/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib64/libfmt.so.9.1.0
